name: HCI Group, Inc.
business: HCI Group, Inc. is primarily engaged in the property and casualty insurance business, providing homeowners property and casualty insurance products for properties located in Florida and other US states. It also offers insurance technology and operations solutions through its majority-owned subsidiary Exzeo, and provides attorney-in-fact services for reciprocal insurance exchanges. Additionally, it has a commercial real estate group involved in developing and operating commercial properties.
sellsTo: Homeowners in Florida and other US states

exposures.sentence: We provide various homeowners property and casualty insurance products for properties located in the State of Florida, which is our primary market, as well as in other states in the northeast and southeast regions of the United States ( U.S. ).

Exzeo Group, Inc. (formerly known as TypTap Insurance Group, Inc.) ( Exzeo ), a majority-owned subsidiary, provides turn-key insurance technology and operations solutions based on a proprietary platform of purpose-built software and data analytics applications that are specifically designed for the property and casualty insurance ecosystem.
In addition, we have a commercial real estate group that is primarily engaged in the business of developing and operating commercial properties for investment purposes or for our own use.

catalysts.event: Condo Owners Reciprocal Exchange (CORE) commenced business operations
catalysts.sentence: February 2024 Condo Owners Reciprocal Exchange ( CORE ), a consolidated reciprocal insurance exchange which provides commercial residential multiple peril insurance, commenced business operations.

catalysts.event: TypTap Insurance Company (TTIC) transferred from Exzeo to HCI Group, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: July 2024 TypTap Insurance Company ( TTIC ), a property and casualty insurance carrier subsidiary, was transferred from Exzeo to HCI Group, Inc.

catalysts.event: Exzeo redeemed all Series A Preferred Stock held by Centerbridge
catalysts.sentence: On January 22, 2024, Exzeo entered into a Stock Redemption Agreement with Centerbridge which allowed Exzeo to redeem all of the Exzeo Series A Preferred Stock held by Centerbridge.

catalysts.event: Tailrow Insurance Exchange (Tailrow) commenced business operations
catalysts.sentence: February 2025 Tailrow Insurance Exchange ( Tailrow ), a consolidated reciprocal insurance exchange which specializes in fire and homeowners multiple peril insurance, commenced business operations.

catalysts.event: Exzeo completed its initial public offering
catalysts.sentence: November 2025 Exzeo completed its initial public offering and its common stock is currently listed on the NYSE under the symbol XZO.

catalysts.event: Board declared quarterly dividend of $0.40 per common share
catalysts.sentence: On January 14, 2026, our Board declared a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per common share.
